vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes file permissions on a log file, which is a standard STIG hardening step and does not affect system services or access mechanisms.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Reduced log file accessibility for non‑root users
